title: Intake & Prerequisites
summary: Capture every Reference Sheet field and confirm the client-side contacts before any build work begins.
customerSummary: Share a few details about your company and team so we can configure everything before your kickoff.
overview:
Everything downstream depends on clean intake. **Missing intake data is the #1 cause of setup rework.** Complete this section fully before creating a single organization.

Work from the signed contract and the intake call. The goal: any team member could pick up this account and build it with zero guesswork.
prerequisites: Intake call completed (or scheduled) with the client
Access to the client Welcome Package
tips: Fill in the **Reference Sheet** (available from the dashboard) first — it drives every later step.
Confirm the Account Type explicitly. Pilot vs Full License can change feature and seat settings later.
Get the client IT/ops contact early — integration steps stall without them.
warnings: Do not start Phase 2 (Email Forwarding / Connector) until the client's IT/ops contact is confirmed and available.
commonMistakes: Leaving Account Type blank and guessing later.
Recording the signer name without the exact title needed for the welcome letter.
Assuming rep count instead of confirming it against the contract.

steps.title: Collect account details
steps.description: Capture Company, Account Type, Start Date, Primary Contact, Contract Term, and Active Users from the signed contract.
steps.verify: No Reference Sheet field left blank; Account Type explicitly marked Pilot or Full License.

steps.title: Confirm signer name & title
steps.description: Record the signer's name and title exactly as it should appear on the welcome letter.
steps.verify: Spelling and title confirmed with CS.

steps.title: Identify the client's IT/ops contact
steps.description: Get name, email, and phone for the person who will help with email forwarding and CRM setup.
steps.verify: Contact has acknowledged they'll help with email + CRM setup.

callouts.text: Integration steps (email forwarding, CRM) require coordination with the client's IT/ops team. Do not start Phase 2 without this contact.

steps.title: Gather organizational structure inputs
steps.description: Document the full org structure: offices, line cards, the hierarchy tree, and a rep roster with the intended permission level for each person.

callouts.text: Per the Welcome Package: offices, line cards, user hierarchies, and individual rep accounts each with the correct permissions.

steps.title: Gather integration details
steps.description: Capture the CRM system name and how credentials/auth will be provided, plus the exact client bid-desk inbox to forward.
steps.verify: You have a path to authenticate the CRM and access the mailbox.

steps.title: Confirm product / line-card data source
steps.description: Identify the source for the product catalog (labeled “Representation” in the platform).
steps.verify: You know where the current line card lives and who can validate it.
